Config includes VAD and breath group settings; system listens for voice activity.

items.title: Explore runtime state

log.text: Capture module sets priority boost on Linux and calculates queue capacity based on sample rate and channels.

items.title: Summarize runtime components
items.summary: Identify primary modules: capture, acoustic, lattice, voice_vector, streaming prosody, etc.

log.text: src/main.rs sets up tracing and calls cli::run().
cli/mod.rs defines submodules: args, commands, download_progress (conditional), live_session, model_paths, piper. It sets up Clap CLI.
args.rs defines CLI argument structs: TextCommand, RecordWavCommand, PlayWavCommand, etc.
model_paths.rs resolves model asset paths and contains logic for downloading models.

cli/commands contains a large set of subcommands: breath_transcribe, continue_generation, cpal_diag, demos, diphone_cache, dogfood_two, draft, ear_scope, go, go1, harmony_go, live_half_duplex, llama, loop_trace, mbrola_inventory, mbrola_render, mel_roundtrip, mic_transcribe, models, prosody_plan, round_trip, sing_demo, soundscape_debug, source_inspection, synthetic_cache, think_say, trace_viewer_export, transcribe, vad_calibration, vad_trace, web, etc.
